results.label: energy bank system
results.command: python3 scripts/trinity_energy_bank_system.py --token-report docs/token-credit-bank-report.json --cache-report docs/cache-waste-regenerator-report.json --reserve-growth 1.0 --reserve-cap-multiplier 10.0 --auto-max-cap --cap-ceiling 100.0 --out docs/energy-bank-report.json --state docs/energy-bank-state.json

results.label: continuity cycle tick (dry-run status)
results.command: python3 scripts/aurelis_cycle_tick.py --user-message 'suite dry-run' --assistant-reflection 'Suite integration check for cycle tick' --progress-snapshot 'Validated dry-run status reporting in suite' --next-step 'Run normal tick from operator flow' --query cycle --query-limit 2 --dry-run --no-report --step-timeout-sec 0 --json-status docs/aurelis-cycle-tick-status.json

results.label: v33 structural OCR validation snapshot
results.command: bash -lc 'strings -n 8 '"'"'Beyonder-Real-True Journey v33 (Arielis) (2).pdf'"'"' | rg -n '"'"'Core Modules|Orchestrator|DID Method|Quantum|Freed|GMUT|Cosmic Bill'"'"' | head -n 20'
